metadata.section_title: Classifier Chain-Based Malicious Code Detection in Smart Contracts

text:
In practical applications, many scenarios require handling
types of malicious code in smart contracts. Decomposing
binary classification problems may indeed ignore potentia
the classifier’s detection capability. The classifier chain mo
learning problems, which fully considers the correlation
computational complexity. By linking binary classifiers in
individual label predictions serve as features for other clas
between labels and improve the classifier’s detection cap
